# AgentCounsel Hub

AgentCounsel Hub is an open legal research platform prototype with human-readable pages and static-export-safe machine-readable endpoints.

## Preferred AI endpoints

- /api/cases/:slug/markdown
- /api/cases/schema
- /api/guidance/schema
- /api/sources/:id
- /api/sources/schema
- /cases/:slug/json
- /cases/:slug/markdown

## Human routes

- /cases
- /cases/:slug
- /cases/schema
- /guidance
- /guidance/schema
- /sources
- /sources/:id
- /sources/schema
- /review
- /review/audit
- /review/proposals
- /saved
- /submit

## Usage notes

- Verify legal conclusions against primary sources.
- Do not treat summaries, topic labels, or treatment signals as legal advice.
- AI-generated metadata is labeled where possible.
- Respect source-specific license and attribution notes.
- Prefer static JSON and Markdown endpoints over scraping HTML pages.
- Use /cases/:slug/json for case record data.
- Use /api/cases/schema to inspect the normalized case record contract.
- Use /api/guidance/schema to inspect the practical guidance resource contract.
- Use /api/sources/:id to inspect source provenance and reuse notes.
- Use /api/sources/schema to inspect the source registry contract.
- Use /review/proposals to export approved local review items as source registry candidates.

## Privacy notes

- Saved research in the MVP is stored locally in the user's browser through IndexedDB.
- Submissions, review notes, review history, and source proposals are stored locally as a mock workflow.
- There is no account system or cloud sync in this prototype.
